title: White Plastic Glue Sticks, 15grams (4 Pack) - Safe & Non-Toxic, Ideal for Paper & Cardboard Bonding
features: STRONG ADHESION: Our white glue sticks come in a convenient pack of 4, each weighing 15 grams, to provide durable bonding for all your projects.
USER-FRIENDLY: Crafted from durable plastic, these glue sticks are designed for easy handling and application. Simply twist up the stick and apply to your desired surface.

SAFE FOR ALL: Craft with confidence knowing our glue is non-toxic and safe for both children and adults, perfect for family craft time or the classroom. Our adhesive solution is made with high-quality materials to ensure safety and reliability.

MULTIPURPOSE TOOL: Our glue sticks are a must-have for every classroom, office, or crafting station. They can be used for a variety of projects and activities, from school assignments to DIY crafts. With our glue sticks, the possibilities are endless.
DESIGNED FOR PAPER & CARDBOARD: Specifically engineered to provide a strong, quick bond on paper and cardboard materials. Perfect for scrapbooking, card making, and school projects.
